source_truth.summary_source: docs_archive/00_source_zips/operator_console/r5-20260715-package-7/extracted/Oday Plus Operator Console R5 Design Summary.dc.html

global_rules: Open the extracted interactive HTML before implementation or review.
Package 6 and 32-label evidence are historical and cannot prove current parity.
Do not embed or import prototype HTML into the product.
Compose ODP-EXT-002 ingestion contracts rather than duplicating them.
Every write requires server authorization, idempotency, correlation, persistence, and audit.
Unknown or blocked source policies fail closed without page retrieval.

tasks.title: Publish canonical R5 package 7 and supersession packet
acceptance: Canonical ZIP and five extracted files match the manifest.
LATEST resolves to R5 package 7 with 37 labels.
R5 task briefs and the ODP-EXT-002 R5 addendum reference package 7 directly.
Historical R4 evidence remains intact and is identified as superseded for current parity.

tasks.title: Implement durable R5 assisted listing intake
acceptance: All five R5 surfaces match package 7 at desktop and constrained width.
URL submission and every decision survive reload through API-backed durable storage.
New duplicate revision possible-match and quarantine outcomes have deterministic tests.
Unknown or blocked source policies do not retrieve the page and offer the specified fallback.
Ambiguous matches require an explicit human reason and never auto-merge.
Audit includes actor role source snapshot parser version before/after reason and correlation ID.

tasks.title: Build assisted-listing functional product E2E acceptance
acceptance: Browser tests exercise all five R5 screen labels against real product routes and API responses to verify package 7 features.
SUBMITTED CHECKING_IDENTITY CHECKING_SOURCE_POLICY AWAITING_ASSISTED_ENTRY RETRIEVING PARSING MATCHING NEEDS_REVIEW READY QUARANTINED and FAILED are covered without fabricated progress.
NEW EXACT_DUPLICATE REVISION POSSIBLE_MATCH and QUARANTINED each have deterministic fixtures and assertions.
APPROVED_RETRIEVAL ASSISTED_ENTRY_ONLY AUTH_REQUIRED SOURCE_BLOCKED and POLICY_UNKNOWN each prove the correct fetch or no-fetch behavior.
Original and canonical URL exact-duplicate-before-fetch parsed-normalized-corrected values correction reasons and changed-field summaries are verified.
Submission processing decisions and corrections survive page reload and a fresh browser context through durable API storage.
Create revise duplicate quarantine reject and promote decisions assert actor role timestamps reason before-after IDs snapshot parser version and correlation ID.
Retryable failure retains user corrections and every error exposes summary next action code correlation ID and occurred time.
Desktop tablet and mobile assertions cover the allowed responsive workflow; ambiguous comparison explicitly requires desktop where specified.
No test uses prototype HTML session-only state or route interception as product-completion proof.

tasks.title: Enforce assisted-listing retrieval security and governance
acceptance: Only configured http or https retrieval methods may run; unsupported schemes fail closed to protect package 7 processing.
Loopback private link-local multicast reserved IPv6-local and cloud metadata targets are rejected before connection.
DNS resolution and every redirect hop are revalidated so redirect and DNS-rebinding paths cannot reach blocked networks.
POLICY_UNKNOWN SOURCE_BLOCKED ASSISTED_ENTRY_ONLY and AUTH_REQUIRED never fetch the submitted page.
The product never accepts raw provider credentials cookies bearer tokens or private API endpoints from this UI.
Retrieval enforces timeout redirect count response-size and content-type limits and produces retryable versus terminal error codes.
Stored snapshots and logs redact contact personal credential and token data according to source policy.
Read-only reviewers cannot submit correct merge split promote or quarantine actions; write checks remain server-side.
Identity-affecting corrections merge split and promotion require reason risk summary idempotency correlation and append-only audit evidence.
Security tests use controlled local doubles and prove no outbound request occurs for every blocked case.
No committed secrets raw sensitive provider data or production session material appear in fixtures evidence logs or telemetry.

tasks.title: Make R5 37-label product visual and accessibility gates mandatory
acceptance: Static source gate pins package 7 SHA and all 37 labels.
The five new R5 surfaces pass desktop and constrained-width screenshots plus axe checks.
The 32 retained R4 labels pass regression coverage.
Browser E2E covers policy fail-closed duplicate revision ambiguous review persistence and audit.
Known R4-011 product-gate failures are fixed rather than waived or skipped.
CI runs the R5 product gate by default.

tasks.title: Deploy verify and cut over R5 Operator Console
acceptance: Staging revision contains R5 code and package 7 provenance.
Authenticated staging E2E passes the mandatory R5 gate.
URL intake persists through reload and produces decision and audit evidence.
Rollback revision and recovery proof are recorded before promotion.
Release evidence identifies package 7 SHA 37 labels and exact deployed revision.
Dev is promoted to main only after all R5 stop conditions are clear.
